title: Westland Safelawn Liquid 1L, Green
features: Made with 100% natural ingredients, this feed contains seaweed that acts as a natural biostimulant and also has a low salt content so it is safe to use on young lawns.
Ideal for use in the summer months for fast greening results, this slow release fertiliser produces long lasting but fast acting results.
Apply every 1-2 weeks from March to October when the grass is actively growing.
Do not apply when frost is expected.
Keep in a safe, dry frost-free place away from children, pets and food.
Fill watering can or sprayer using 50ml of product per 4.5L of water to cover 5sq.m.
description: From the manufacturer Westland 20400549 Safelawn Liquid 1L, Green It glides on easily with rich color that lasts for hours. High-shine finish provides all day moisture.
